a2a:agent-card.a2a:json: { "protocolVersion": "0.3.0", "name": "atelier-procurement-agent", "description": "調達担当 AI エージェント (Atelier 用 同期 A2A 版)。代替部品検索 / 在庫予約 / 発注ドラフト / サプライヤー通知 / リスクスコア更新を LLM tool-use ループで実施し、統合サマリを返す。", "url": "${agent.public.url}", "version": "1.0.0", "preferredTransport": "JSONRPC", "capabilities": { "streaming": false, "pushNotifications": false, "stateTransitionHistory": false }, "defaultInputModes": ["text/plain", "application/json"], "defaultOutputModes": ["text/plain", "application/json"], "skills": [ { "id": "procurement_handle_incident", "name": "調達インシデント対応 (LLM tool-use)", "description": "サプライヤー品質インシデント連絡を自然文で受け取り、代替部品検索 / 在庫照会 / 在庫予約 / 発注ドラフト / 通知 / リスクスコア更新 / KG 記録を tool-use ループで実施し、Slack 投稿フォーマットの統合サマリを返す。", "examples": [ "関西部品 G-KANSAI-PARTS-001 の P-2024-KAN-001 で不良率15% (500個 HIGH)。INC-2026-0521。代替部品で調達対応してほしい。" ], "inputModes": ["text/plain", "application/json"], "outputModes": ["text/plain", "application/json"], "tags": ["procurement", "inventory", "purchase-order"] } ] }

logger.message: #['atelier-procurement-agent A2A task received. method=' ++ (attributes.jsonRpcMethod default '?') ++ ' taskId=' ++ (attributes.taskId default '?')]

ee:transform.doc:name: extract user text + task ids + contextId

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((attributes.taskId default (now() as String)) as String)
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- if (payload is String) read(payload, "application/json") else payload

%dw 2.0 output application/java var p = if (payload is String) read(payload, "application/json") else payload var fromAttr = (attributes.contextId default "") as String var fromMsg = (p.message.contextId default "") as String --- if (fromAttr != "") fromAttr else fromMsg
%dw 2.0 output application/java var p = if (payload is String) read(payload, "application/json") else payload --- (((p.message.parts default [])[0].text default "") as String)
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- "⚠️ atelier-procurement-agent: Agent ループ中にエラーが発生しました。\n" ++ " " ++ ((error.description default (error.message default "unknown")) as String)

%dw 2.0 output application/java var t = ((vars.finalText default "") as String) --- if (t == "") "ℹ️ atelier-procurement-agent: 結論を生成できませんでした (loops=" ++ ((vars.loopCount default 0) as String) ++ ")" else t
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- 0
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ""
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ""
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- []

%dw 2.0 output application/java var sysPrompt = "あなたは調達担当の AI アシスタント (atelier-procurement-agent) です。
" ++ "
" ++ "最重要原則: ユーザの最後の user メッセージに登場する固有名詞 (会社名・部品番号・必要数・インシデントID) を tool 引数にそのまま使うこと。「unknown supplier」「GENERIC-001」「placeholder」などの仮名は絶対に使わない。 user 発話に「関西部品」とあれば必ず supplierName="関西部品" を渡す。
" ++ "
" ++ "ユーザーから来たインシデント連絡をもとに、必要に応じて以下のツールを呼び出し、調達対応を完了させてください:
" ++ " 1) resolve_supplier (mdm-mcp): サプライヤー名 → ゴールデン ID
" ++ " 2) get_supplier_relations (mdm-mcp): 過去インシデント・代替部品候補
" ++ " 3) get_alternative_parts (procurement-mcp): 代替部品の互換スコア
" ++ " 4) check_inventory (inventory-mcp): 在庫数量
" ++ " 5) reserve_inventory (inventory-mcp): 在庫を仮確保
" ++ " 6) create_purchase_order_draft (procurement-mcp): 発注書ドラフト作成 (代替元の supplierGoldenId が必要)
" ++ " 7) notify_supplier (procurement-mcp): サプライヤーへ ORDER 通知
" ++ " 8) update_supplier_risk_score (mdm-mcp): リスクスコア更新 (品質問題が確認できたら 0..1 で上げる)
" ++ " 9) update_ontology (mdm-mcp): KG にトリプル記録

" ++ "重要: 各 tool の返り値は次のように JSON ネストされて返ります。
" ++ " - resolve_supplier → result.supplier.goldenId / result.supplier.name (matched=false でも success ステータス)
" ++ " - get_alternative_parts → result.alternatives[i].partNumber / .compatibility / .supplierGoldenId / .supplierName
" ++ " - check_inventory → result.quantityOnHand / result.available / result.warehouse
" ++ " - reserve_inventory → result.reservationId / result.ttlSeconds
" ++ " - create_purchase_order_draft → result.draftId / result.totalAmount
" ++ " - notify_supplier → result.notificationId
" ++ " - update_supplier_risk_score → result.previousScore / result.newScore
" ++ " - update_ontology → result.tripleId
" ++ "
" ++ "進め方 (各 tool の返り値から次の引数へ値を引き継ぐ):
" ++ " 1. resolve_supplier(supplierName=ユーザの言ったサプライヤー名) を呼ぶ。返り値の result.supplier.goldenId を取引先ゴールデン ID として保持。
" ++ " 入力に「関西部品」「中部マテリアル」のような名前があれば必ずこの tool を呼ぶこと。matched=false でもサプライヤー名の正規化候補が返るので諦めない。
" ++ " 2. get_alternative_parts(partNumber=元の部品番号) で代替部品候補を取得。result.alternatives[0] の partNumber と supplierGoldenId を採用 (互換スコア降順で並んでいる)。
" ++ " 3. check_inventory(partNumber=代替部品番号, requiredQuantity=必要数) で在庫を確認。
" ++ " 4. result.available が true なら以下を続けて実行:
" ++ " a. reserve_inventory(partNumber=代替, quantity=必要数, incidentId=ユーザ提示の INC ID, ttlSeconds=86400)
" ++ " b. create_purchase_order_draft(partNumber=代替, quantity=必要数, supplierGoldenId=代替の supplierGoldenId, incidentId=INC ID)
" ++ " c. notify_supplier(supplierGoldenId=代替の supplierGoldenId, type="ORDER", message=注文内容, incidentId=INC ID)
" ++ " 5. 元サプライヤーの品質問題が裏付けられたら update_supplier_risk_score(supplierGoldenId=ステップ 1 で得たゴールデン ID, riskScore=0.85, reason=理由, incidentId=INC ID)。
" ++ " 6. 最後に update_ontology(subject=INC ID, predicate="hasResolution", object=draftId, incidentId=INC ID)。
" ++ "
" ++ "重要ルール:
" ++ " - ユーザに情報を聞き返さない。サプライヤー名 / 部品番号 / 必要数 / incidentId のうち何か一つでも分かれば、即 resolve_supplier から始めて tool 連鎖を進めること。
" ++ " - 数量や severity が不明なら quantity=500 / severity="MEDIUM" / reason="unspecified" などの妥当な default で先に進める。「情報下さい」フォームは出力しない。
" ++ " - tool が status=success で返したら必ず result.* の中身を読み、「取得できませんでした」と書かない。
" ++ "
" ++ "会話履歴について:
" ++ " - 以前のターンが含まれる場合は参照し、解決済みの supplierGoldenId / 代替部品 / reservationId / draftId を覚えていれば後続では再呼び出しせず即答すること。
" ++ "
" ++ "全ての必要ツールを呼び終えたら、Atelier に返す統合サマリ (Markdown 短文・5〜10 行) を返してください。
" ++ "次のフォーマットで:
" ++ " ✅ procurement-agent: <一言サマリ>
" ++ " - 取引先: <name> (<goldenId>)
" ++ " - 代替部品: <partNumber> 互換 <%>
" ++ " - 在庫: <quantityOnHand> 個
" ++ " - 発注ドラフト: <draftId> ¥<totalAmount>
" ++ " - 通知: <notificationId>
" ++ " - リスクスコア更新: <previous> → <new>" --- if ((vars.priorMessages default []) != []) (vars.priorMessages default []) ++ [{ role: "user", content: (vars.userText default "") as String }] else [ { role: "system", content: sysPrompt }, { role: "user", content: (vars.userText default "") as String } ]
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- 1 to (p('agent.max_loops') as Number)
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((payload default 0) - 1) as Number

logger.message: #['Agent loop done. iterations=' ++ (vars.loopCount as String) ++ ' finishReason=' ++ (vars.finishReason default '')]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { model: (p('llm.model') default "gpt-5-mini") as String, max_completion_tokens: (p('llm.max_tokens') default 2048) as Number, messages: vars.messages default [], tools: vars.tools default [], tool_choice: "auto" }
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- (((payload default {}).choices default [])[0].message) default { role: "assistant", content: "" }
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((((payload default {}).choices default [])[0].finish_reason) default "") as String
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- (vars.messages default []) ++ [(((payload default {}).choices default [])[0].message) default { role: "assistant", content: "" }]
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((vars.assistantMsg.content default "") as String)

logger.message: #['Loop iter=' ++ (vars.loopCount as String) ++ ' finishReason=' ++ (vars.finishReason default '') ++ ' tool_calls=' ++ ((sizeOf(vars.assistantMsg.tool_calls default []) as String))]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((payload."id" default "") as String)
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((payload.function.name default "") as String)
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((payload.function.arguments default "{}") as String)
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- read((vars.toolArgsRaw default "{}") as String, "application/json")

%dw 2.0 output application/java var n = (vars.toolName default "") as String --- if (n == "resolve_supplier" or n == "get_supplier_relations" or n == "update_supplier_risk_score" or n == "update_ontology") "mdm" else if (n == "check_inventory" or n == "reserve_inventory" or n == "cancel_inventory_reservation") "inventory" else if (n == "get_alternative_parts" or n == "create_purchase_order_draft" or n == "notify_supplier") "procurement" else "unknown"

%dw 2.0 output application/java --- (vars.messages default []) ++ [{ role: "tool", tool_call_id: (vars.toolCallId default "") as String, content: write((vars.toolResult default {}), "application/json") as String }]
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- (vars.actionsLog default []) ++ [{ tool: (vars.toolName default "") as String, result: (vars.toolResult default {}) }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { toolName: (vars.toolName default "") as String, "input": (vars.toolArgs default {}) }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "error", tool: (vars.toolName default "") as String, result: { code: "UNKNOWN_TOOL", message: "no MCP for tool: " ++ (vars.toolName default "") } }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "error", tool: (vars.toolName default "") as String, result: { code: "MCP_CALL_FAILED", message: (error.description default error.message default "unknown") as String } }

logger.message: #['MCP call failed kind=' ++ (vars.mcpKind default '') ++ ' tool=' ++ (vars.toolName default '') ++ ' err=' ++ (error.description default error.message default 'unknown')]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- []

%dw 2.0 output application/java fun parseList(s) = if (s == null or s == "") [] else read(s, "application/json") --- if (vars.priorRaw == null) [] else if (vars.priorRaw is String) parseList(vars.priorRaw as String) else (vars.priorRaw default [])
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- []

logger.message: #['memory load: contextId=' ++ (vars.contextId default '') ++ ' priorMessages=' ++ (sizeOf(vars.priorMessages default []) as String)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- write((vars.messages default []), "application/json") as String

logger.message: #['memory save: contextId=' ++ (vars.contextId default '') ++ ' messages=' ++ (sizeOf(vars.messages default []) as String)]
